games.title: The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom
games.description: Sky islands ~22fps even on SD8E. Pre-build shader cache.

games.title: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe
games.description: Locked 60 on SD8E. Best Switch experience via emu.

games.title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
games.description: Wii U version via Cemu runs better than Switch via Eden.

games.title: Shin Megami Tensei V
games.description: Vengeance edition on PC is the definitive version.

games.title: Fire Emblem: Three Houses
games.description: Good in Eden, drops in mass battles.

games.title: Fire Emblem: Engage
games.description: Newer FE. Plays well on Eden.

games.title: Pokémon Scarlet/Violet
games.description: Famously rough perf even on hardware. Emu can't fix it.

games.title: Bayonetta 3
games.description: Drops frames in combat heavy scenes.

games.title: Splatoon 3
games.description: Online is blocked; single player works.

games.title: Super Mario 3D World + Bowser's Fury
games.description: Switch port runs better than Wii U original.

games.title: Monster Hunter Generations
games.description: Switch Ultimate is better; 3DS original is solid on Azahar.

games.title: Pokémon X
games.description: Gen VI. Azahar handles it well.

games.title: Pokémon Sun/Moon
games.description: Gen VII. Slightly heavier; runs fine.

games.title: Fire Emblem Echoes: Shadows of Valentia
Kingdom Hearts 3D: Dream Drop Distance

games.title: Super Smash Bros. for Wii U
The Wonderful 101

games.title: Donkey Kong Country: Tropical Freeze

games.title: The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker
games.description: HD remake on Wii U is also great via Cemu.

games.title: The Legend of Zelda: Twilight Princess
games.description: HD remake on Wii U is the way.

games.title: Metroid Prime 3: Corruption
games.description: Wii original. Trilogy on Wii is also great.

games.title: Resident Evil 4 (GC)
games.description: Original RE4 release. Dolphin runs it locked.

games.title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time
games.description: Ship of Harkinian PC port is definitive.

games.title: The Legend of Zelda: Majora's Mask
games.description: 2 Ship 2 Harkinian PC port is the way.

games.title: Super Mario 64
games.description: sm64-port native PC build is best.

games.title: Banjo-Kazooie
games.description: Native PC port via decomp also exists.

games.title: Paper Mario
games.description: Switch Online version is best on handheld.

games.description: N. Sane Trilogy is the modern way.

games.title: Resident Evil
